subhero: Write your ideas. Keep your docs safe and private. Decide where your data goes.
pitch_data_choice_subtitle: Your notes stay with you. Store them locally on your device for complete offline access, or sync with a cloud service of your choice—your data, your control.
pitch_ai_choice_subtitle: You can choose from a variety of open-source AI agents to suit your needs. Run them locally for privacy.
pitch_no_lockin_subtitle: We use public file formats and make it easy to export your data. No lock-in to a specific system or service.
pitch_pretty_design_subtitle: Our text editor is fast, responsive, and designed to keep up with you. With a sleek, modern interface, it's both functional and visually appealing. Enjoy smooth, efficient note-taking every time.
compatibility_subtitle: Our app is designed to work seamlessly across all major platforms. Whether you're on desktop, mobile, or web, you'll have the same great experience.
call_to_alpha_title: Be one of the first to try
call_to_alpha_subtitle: Download our alpha version and try our platform.
download_subtitle: Have a great experience, without sharing your data.
choose_platform: Choose your platform and download the latest version of Writeopia
contact_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Have questions, feedback, or need assistance?
contact_send_email: You can send an email at
contact_time_reply: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24-48 hours during business days.
apt_install: Install using apt (Ubuntu and Debian based)
privacy_footer: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your rights regarding your personal data, please contact us using the information above.
privacy_body1: We take privacy very seriously and we understand how frustrating it is when apps collect your data without your knowledge.
privacy_body2: At Writeopia we have the fundamental principles:
privacy_principle1: - Users have full control over their data and can choose not to send any information through the app at any time. If a feature requires data to function, the app will clearly inform the user about this need before any data is shared.
privacy_principle2: - The app will always support full offline usage.
privacy_principle3: - We don't share your personal information with anyone except to comply with the law or protect our rights.
privacy_principle4: - We don't ask you for personal information unless we truly need it.
privacy_principle5: - We don't store personal information on our servers unless required for the on-going operation of the service.
